positive: A mesmerizing, symmetrical cosmic floral mandala design. The main subject is a stylized representation of bioluminescent flora intertwined with celestial patterns, featuring deep indigo, ethereal cyan, rich sapphire blue, and touches of neon violet. The composition must be perfectly centered, forming a circular, detailed motif suitable for an all-over print or central chest graphic. Use strong contrast and clean, crisp lines, reminiscent of Art Deco patterns mixed with modern psychedelic art. The lighting should be dramatic and internal, emanating only from the glowing elements of the flora and stars. Graphic quality, vector art feel, perfect for screen printing on apparel, minimal gradient use, high detail, sharp edges, kawaii aesthetic.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, grainy, text, watermark, logo, trademark, celebrity, cartoon, messy lines, bad anatomy, noise, artifact, extra limbs, low resolution
